raw: This one-day Library Partner Admission Pass admits up to 4 people to a Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary. With this pass, admission is discounted to $2 per visitor over the age of 2. Please visit https://www.massaudubon.org/get-outdoors/wildlife-sanctuaries/trails for the latest information, including safety guidelines. Please Note: Drumlin Farms is only open on Mondays when it is a holiday. Otherwise you can visit Tuesday-Sunday.
